/X: THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER, 04-26-22/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 12 M:PJ 37D/CTS: 37  /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X: THE SENTENCES IN COUNTS 2 AND 3 ARE IDENTICAL,/654:2/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ABIDE BY PREVIOUSLY SERVED STAY AWAY ORDERS FROM MAYANRIVERA,2595 MISSION ST, SF AND 1700 CHURCH ST, SF/

/CAL  PRELIMINARY HEARING- FW FROM D9/WITEXCL  DEFENSE/WIT SWORN DA  KEVIN MOONEY, SFPD; SERGEANT CHRISTOPHER SERVAT, SFPD/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1- 3 COLOR PHOTOS OF MALE WEARING BOW TIE; PEOPLE'S 2- (ELECTRONIC) SURVEILLANCE VIDEO OF WOMAN AT ATM (1 MIN 13 SEC); PEOPLE'S 3- (ELECTRONIC) SURVEILLANCE VIDEO (FROM WITHIN THE MACHINE)OF MALE AT ATM  (2 MIN 1 SEC); PEOPLE'S 4- COLOR PHOTO OF SFPD MUG SHOT/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X: COURT CONTINUES WITH ADMONITION AND SENTENCING/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT AND SFSD AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURNS/BWDNC/CTORD: BAILREMAINS AT $25,000/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THATRELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATIONWOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:AND WOULD NOT REASONABLY ASSURE THE DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE AT TRIAL,/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/TE: 1 HOUR/CONTD: 02-04-22, PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-21-22/TE:90 MINUTES/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH  ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE ANELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODYAND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:MARYAN RIVERA/SAORD2/SAORD3/WEAP/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DAWT/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 26/TRANS 26:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
